Child.definition: a young person of either sex

Attention.definition: the process whereby a person concentrates on some features of the environment to the (relative) exclusion of others

Play.definition: be at play; be engaged in playful activity; amuse oneself in a way characteristic of children

Nephew.definition: a son of your brother or sister

Kid.definition: a young person of either sex

Show.definition: something intended to communicate a particular impression
a social event involving a public performance or entertainment

Tap.definition: make light, repeated taps on a surface

Niece.definition: a daughter of your brother or sister

Baby.definition: a very young child (birth to 1 year) who has not yet begun to walk or talk

Help.definition: the activity of contributing to the fulfillment of a need or furtherance of an effort or purpose

Toy.definition: an artifact designed to be played with

Wake.definition: be awake, be alert, be there

Ice_cream.definition: frozen dessert containing cream and sugar and flavoring

Cry.definition: a loud utterance; often in protest or opposition

Hungry.definition: feeling hunger; feeling a need or desire to eat food
